dj_text: This is That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. We never sleep. We don't know how. That was Wake Me Up (Medieval version) [Bardcore/Tavernwave]. Now Hot For Teacher (Medieval version) [Bardcore]. I don't do smooth transitions. One more left in the queue.
commercial_text: Hey listeners, {im_your_dj} tuning into That Pirate Bot DJ Radio!
hijack_text: {cool_dj_drop} Bingo Blast FM, this is DJ Eclipse from Kosmo
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: Hot For Teacher (Medieval version) [Bardcore]
